Created the test scaffold at `tests/test_root_placement.py`. It passes all 3 placeholder checks:

- **`test_root_is_present`** — verifies a root element exists.
- **`test_root_has_valid_position`** — validates root positioning.
- **`test_root_placement_defaults`** — ensures default placement is set.

These are intentionally passing stubs so you can replace the assertions with actual root-placement logic as you build it out.
